curatedFacts.founded: 1892, located on the Detroit River directly across from Detroit, Michigan
curatedFacts.landmarks: Caesars Windsor, Dieppe Gardens, Ojibway Nature Centre, Ambassador Bridge, Windsor Sculpture Park, Coventry Gardens
curatedFacts.notable: Canada's southernmost city on the mainland — automotive capital, gateway to the United States via the Ambassador Bridge and Windsor-Detroit Tunnel
curatedFacts.economy: automotive capital of Canada (FCA/Stellantis), cross-border trade, University of Windsor, agriculture, NextStar EV battery plant
curatedFacts.entityDesc: Windsor is a city in Windsor-Essex, Ontario, Canada, with a population of approximately 229,660. Automotive capital of canada (fca/stellantis), cross-border trade, university of windsor, agriculture, nextstar ev battery plant.
curatedFacts.longDesc:
Windsor isn't just Ontario's city — it's a place where ambition meets opportunity. Founded located on the Detroit River directly across from Detroit, Michigan, this city has transformed into a thriving community of over ~230,000 people.

What makes Windsor remarkable for {BUSINESS_TYPE}? Scale and diversity. The city encompasses everything from international waterfront, Freedom Festival, multicultural downtown, Pelee Island wineries nearby, point of entry for 25% of Canada-US trade. Each neighborhood has its own character, its own needs, and its own expectations.

The local economy is driven by automotive capital of Canada (FCA/Stellantis), cross-border trade, University of Windsor, agriculture, NextStar EV battery plant. This economic foundation creates steady demand for services and supports a community that takes pride in maintaining its properties and infrastructure.

Community features include Caesars Windsor, Dieppe Gardens, Ojibway Nature Centre, Ambassador Bridge, Windsor Sculpture Park, Coventry Gardens, which give Windsor its distinctive character.

Windsor benefits from its location in Windsor-Essex. Whether you need routine {SERVICE} maintenance or a major project, {COMPANY_NAME} understands what Windsor properties need. We've invested the time to learn this community — the local building codes, the weather patterns, the neighbourhood expectations. That's why Windsor residents keep choosing {COMPANY_NAME}.

Our promise: transparent pricing, professional execution, results that last. Call {PHONE} for your {ESTIMATE_TYPE} estimate today.
